ddls:
CREATE TABLE "school_years" (
  "school_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school year */,
  "school_year" TEXT /* The school year (e.g., 2014-15) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the school year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the school year */,
  "is_current_year" INTEGER /* A boolean flag indicating if the school year is the current active year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leas" (
  "lea_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LEA */,
  "lea_admin_unit_number" INTEGER /* Administrative unit number for the LEA */,
  "lea_name" TEXT /* Name of the LEA */,
  "lea_type" TEXT /* Type of LEA (e.g., School District) */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the LEA is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the LEA */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the LEA */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the LEA */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the LEA */,
  "number_of_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools under the LEA */,
  "total_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the LEA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "student_demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student demographic entry */,
  "lea_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the LEA */,
  "school_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school year */,
  "total_students" REAL /* Total number of students */,
  "american_indian" REAL /* Percentage of students who are American Indian/Alaskan Native */,
  "asian" REAL /* Percentage of students who are Asian */,
  "black" REAL /* Percentage of students who are Black */,
  "hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of students who are Hispanic */,
  "two_or_more_races" REAL /* Percentage of students who are Two or More Races */,
  "native_hawaiian" REAL /* Percentage of students who are Native Hawaiian/Pacific Islander */,
  "white" REAL /* Percentage of students who are White */,
  "economic_status" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving free or reduced-price meals */,
  "special_education" REAL /* Percentage of students in special education programs */,
  "english_language_learners" REAL /* Percentage of students who are English Language Learners */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA of students */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate of students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_lea_id FOREIGN KEY ("lea_id") REFERENCES leas ("lea_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_school_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_year_id") REFERENCES school_years ("school_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged into the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "lea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LEA whose data was accessed */,
  "school_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school year whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used for access */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_school_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_year_id") REFERENCES school_years ("school_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_lea_id FOREIGN KEY ("lea_id") REFERENCES leas ("lea_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
